title: Anniversary Study Outlines Released
content: All study outlines, course handouts, and choir music files for the 40th anniversary are now available. You can download them directly from the Resources section.

title: Leaders' Camp Registration & Check-In
content: Chapter leaders and coordinates are reminded that check-in desks at the Baptist Academy Hostels open at 9:00 AM on Monday, August 10, 2026. The opening charge begins at 6:00 PM.

title: Anniversary Commemorative Shirts Available
content: Official BSF @ 40 anniversary shirts and journals are available for pickup at the Alumni Secretariat. Registered delegates who ordered shirts should present their camp vouchers.
